body:
Love this layout by Nichol Magouirk using our brown Sweet tag.

Our fuchsia Sweet tag can be spotted in Glitter Girl's video:

Layout by Shimelle, copyright Two Peas In a Bucket.

*******************************************

Be sure to check out Ali Edwards' blog as she is giving away 3 hand stitched tags, which are only available on Two Peas. 

And speaking of Two Peas In a Bucket - have you seen all their new goodies? See below for a free shipping code for orders over $35 (non phase-out/non-digital product). I received my order along with Daydream Believer Studio Calico kit the other day.

The coupon code is ATAEGA and should be entered at checkout on Two Peas. Details: The user will receive free shipping on domestically shipped orders when his/her total is $35 or greater in non-digital/non-phaseout product. International customers will receive a $5 discount on shipping expenses. Promo code will expire Wednesday, February 15 at 11:59pm CST.
